Xun Jian иҚҖе„ү
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Jian (иҚҖе„ү). Son of Xun Shu, uncle to Xun Yu, one of the вҖҳEight DragonsвҖҷ Xun Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
